query.original: What conditions cause the Grappled condition to end?

- The condition ends if the grappler is incapacitated (see the condition).

answer: The Grappled condition ends if the grappler is incapacitated or if an effect removes the grappled creature from the reach of the grappler or grappling effect. (Refer to the provided rules in the Conditions.md file under the "Grappled" subheading.)
